iteration_history.description: Rewrote SKILL.md to prioritize python-pptx over html2pptx for text-only presentations. Added python-pptx examples for both creation and extraction.
iteration_history.notes: Create task fixed. Extract broke because model tried python-pptx as python -c one-liner (indentation failures).

iteration_history.description: Added critical rule: always write Python to .py files, never use python -c. Fixed zsh pip install quoting. Added markitdown extraction guidance.
iteration_history.notes: Model writes .py file now but financial regex fails on region parsing (name extraction wrong).

iteration_history.description: Emphasized markitdown + manual JSON as recommended approach for extraction. Kept python-pptx extraction as alternative.
iteration_history.notes: Model still used python-pptx extraction. Same regex issues with regions.

iteration_history.description: Removed python-pptx extraction example entirely. Made markitdown-only extraction MANDATORY with explicit 3-step workflow.
iteration_history.notes: Model tried web search, then fell back to python-pptx extraction. Lower score due to additional failures.

iteration_history.description: Strengthened extraction guidance with explicit DO NOT instructions. Made markitdown workflow the only documented extraction approach with clear step-by-step instructions.
iteration_history.notes: Model followed markitdown approach. Minor slide structure issue (0.75) but financial data perfect (1.0).

key_changes: Replaced complex html2pptx workflow with simple python-pptx for text-only presentations
Added critical rule to always write Python to .py files (never python -c)
Fixed zsh pip install bracket quoting guidance
Made markitdown the mandatory extraction approach with explicit DO NOT use regex scripts
Removed python-pptx extraction code examples that misled the model into writing buggy regex parsers
Simplified SKILL.md from 484 lines to ~90 lines focused on what qwen3-30b needs
